description: Trigger accuracy evaluation for the nano-banana skill. Each entry is a user prompt that should or should not trigger this skill. Used with the skill-creator eval framework.

should_trigger.query: Generate me an infographic about renewable energy with bar charts.
should_trigger.why: Infographic generation - canonical Nano Banana use case (especially Pro for text accuracy).

should_trigger.query: Edit this photo to remove the background and keep only the person.
should_trigger.why: Photo editing with preservation - core conversational-editing skill.

should_trigger.query: Create a YouTube thumbnail with my face on the left and the title 'How AI Works' in big bold letters.
should_trigger.why: YouTube thumbnail design - documented use case, has its own section.

should_trigger.query: I have a storyboard of 6 frames - help me generate consistent images with the same main character.
Translate the Polish text in this product photo to English while keeping the design intact.
Stworz mi grafike inforgraficzna o sprzedazy w 2025.
should_trigger.why: Polish phrasing for infographic - skill handles Polish input, English prompt output.

should_trigger.query: Pomoz mi zrobic obrazek na landing page produktu.
should_trigger.why: Polish casual landing-page image request - canonical trigger.

should_trigger.query: What's the difference between Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro?
should_trigger.why: Model selection question - skill has a Model Lineup section covering this.

should_trigger.query: How much does it cost to generate a 4K image with Gemini?
should_trigger.why: Pricing question - skill includes references/pricing.md with per-tier costs.

should_trigger.query: My generated image has misspelled text. How do I fix this?
should_trigger.why: Troubleshooting - covered in Common Issues table (switch to Pro/NB2, add 'all text ultra-sharp').

should_trigger.query: Restore this old damaged photo of my grandparents.
should_trigger.why: Photo restoration - editing use case, action verb 'Restore' listed in editing template.

should_trigger.query: Generate a product mockup of a wine bottle on marble with soft lighting.
should_trigger.why: Product photography prompt - covered in prompt-examples.md.

should_not_trigger.query: Generate a video from this script about a cat learning to skateboard.
should_not_trigger.why: Video generation - this is Kling/Veo territory, not image generation.

should_not_trigger.query: Animate this character so they walk across the screen.
should_not_trigger.why: Animation = video, not still image generation.

should_not_trigger.query: Write me ad copy for a wine subscription service.
Design a logo for me in Figma and export it as SVG.
should_not_trigger.why: Vector/manual tool work - Nano Banana outputs raster only.

should_not_trigger.query: How do I install Photoshop on macOS?
should_not_trigger.why: Tool installation question, not image generation.

should_not_trigger.query: Recommend good stock photo sites for commercial use.
should_not_trigger.why: Stock photo discovery, not AI generation.

should_not_trigger.query: Make a PowerPoint presentation about quarterly sales.
should_not_trigger.why: Presentation/slides task - not image generation. Even if slides contain images, the deliverable is .pptx.

edge_cases.query: Make me an image for a Slack GIF.
edge_cases.why: Could match slack-gif-creator (animated GIF) instead. Nano Banana generates stills, so should NOT trigger if user wants animation. Should trigger if user clarifies they want a still.

Could match canvas-design (PDF posters with design philosophy) or nano-banana (AI-generated poster image). Trigger when context indicates AI image generation specifically (e.g., 'AI poster', 'Gemini poster'). Otherwise defer to canvas-design for designed posters.
